quoteDescription: Neo Aust - 53x53mm Lid Labels x 13 Kinds (11,000) Neo Aust - 80x80mm Front Labels x 10 Kinds Back Labels x 10 Kinds (16,000) Neo Aust - 20x230mm Tamper Labels x 10 Kinds (8,500) Neo Aust - 35x35mm Mini Jar Labels x 1 Kind (1,000) Artwork
lineDescription: Neo Aust - 35x35mm Mini Jar Labels x 1 Kind (1,000)||Size: 35mm x 35mm||Material: PP Metallic Silver||Print Colour: White + CMYK||Tool: D0035(6,7)(6,3)0mm Circle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE LAMINATE||HAND APPLIED||Supply: ***Rolls of 500*** SUPPLIED ON SINGLE ROLLS||Qty: 1000||1,000 x Coconut Truffle||***Special Group Unit Price***||
